title: Polished Natural Marble Mortar and Mushroom Pestle Set with Anti-Scratch Pad, Fine Grind Easily Stone Grinder and Crusher Bowl for Spices Pills Herbs Coffee Beans, Black, 4"
description:
About this item
Marble Mortar and Pestle Set: This mortar and pestle set is made of natural marble, the surface of the mortar and the tail of the pestle have been polished and unpolished natural rough interior for better grinding.
Efficient Grinding and Labor-Saving: This 3-inch diameter grinding bowl is easy to grip, gets a fine grind easily, suitable for grinding individual amounts.
Wide Application: Can be used as stone grinder bowl, herb crusher, pills crusher, spice tools, fresh guacamole maker, salsa grinder, pesto grinder, coffee beans grinder, and so on.
Easy to Clean: This pestle and mortar bowl set made from solid marble which will not absorb juice and smell, just use a sponge to rinse the grinding bowl thoroughly in water.
Item Dimensions(LxWxH): 9.5x9.5x10cm/3.74x3.74x3.93inch.
reviews_5s:
Easy to use, easy to clean, I use this to grind up my spices and some tea's. Does the job quite nicely.

Very sturdy and the base doesn't slip around.I use this to grind daily meditations. Excellent craftsmanshipPlay Video
I live the size of this mortar. It work well but you have to tilt the petal to crush whatever is inside But is does the job . I also love how I can keep my crushed stuff coveredHelpful for crushing seasoning & Herbs .
